result.stderr:
AzureDiskSnapshotTool 1.1
Copyright (C) 2026 AzureDiskSnapshotTool

  -t, --tenantId                Required. Tenant ID against which to
                                authenticate the current Azure credentials.

  -s, --subscriptionId          Required. Subscription ID in which the managed
                                disk exists.

  -i, --targetsubscriptionId    Required. Subscription ID in which the the
                                snapshot will be created.

  -g, --resourceGroup           Required. Resource group in which the managed
                                disk exists.

  -o, --targetresourceGroup     Required. Resource group in which the snapshot
                                will be created.

  -n, --diskName                Required. Name of the managed disk from which to
                                take a snapshot.

  -f, --snapshotName            Required. Defines the name of the snapshot
                                resource.

  -l, --retainLimit             (Default: 0) Limits the retained snapshots to
                                specified count.  Default is unlimited (0).

  -k, --skuType                 (Default: Standard_LRS) Snapshot sku type.
                                Available values are 'Standard_LRS' or
                                'Premium_LRS'. Default is 'Standard_LRS'.

  --help                        Display this help screen.

  --version                     Display version information.

AzureDiskSnapshotTool 1.1
Copyright (C) 2026 AzureDiskSnapshotTool

  -t, --tenantId                Required. Tenant ID against which to
                                authenticate the current Azure credentials.

  -s, --subscriptionId          Required. Subscription ID in which the managed
                                disk exists.

  -i, --targetsubscriptionId    Required. Subscription ID in which the the
                                snapshot will be created.

  -g, --resourceGroup           Required. Resource group in which the managed
                                disk exists.

  -o, --targetresourceGroup     Required. Resource group in which the snapshot
                                will be created.

  -n, --diskName                Required. Name of the managed disk from which to
                                take a snapshot.

  -f, --snapshotName            Required. Defines the name of the snapshot
                                resource.

  -l, --retainLimit             (Default: 0) Limits the retained snapshots to
                                specified count.  Default is unlimited (0).

  -k, --skuType                 (Default: Standard_LRS) Snapshot sku type.
                                Available values are 'Standard_LRS' or
                                'Premium_LRS'. Default is 'Standard_LRS'.

  --help                        Display this help screen.

  --version                     Display version information.

staticCommands.name: create
staticCommands.description: Creates a snapshot of the specified managed disk.

options.description: Name of the managed disk from which to take a snapshot.
Resource group in which the managed disk exists.
Defines the name of the snapshot resource.
Subscription ID in which the managed disk exists.
Resource group in which the snapshot will be created.
Subscription ID in which the the snapshot will be created.
Tenant ID against which to authenticate the current Azure credentials.
Limits the retained snapshots to specified count.  Default is unlimited (0).
Snapshot sku type.  Available values are 'Standard_LRS' or 'Premium_LRS'. Default is 'Standard_LRS'.
